subject: [PATCH v5] binfmt_elf: Align eligible read-only PT_LOAD segments to PMD_SIZE for THP

reviews.author: Usama Arif
reviews.summary: Acknowledged the patch's alignment issue, but pointed out that it is not the only problem and more work is needed on mmap heuristics and unmapped areas.

2026-03-15.patch_summary: The patch aims to align eligible read-only PT_LOAD segments to PMD_SIZE for THP, but the author acknowledges that this is not the only issue and more work is needed on mmap heuristics and unmapped areas.
